---
title: "Rachel Gorman"
page-layout: full
---


::: {.hero-layout}

::: {.hero-text}

# Rachel Gorman

Write your about text here. This will behave exactly like your hero section, so it will not break layout or overflow.

You can include multiple paragraphs, like a normal About page.

A second paragraph can go here for spacing and readability.

::: 

::: {.hero-image}

![](mouse2.jpg)

<!-- Buttons under image -->
::: {.hero-buttons}

[GitHub](https://github.com/gormanr33){.hero-button}
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/rachel-gorman-6825431b9){.hero-button}
[Email](mailto:gormanr33@gmail.com){.hero-button}

:::

:::

:::
